error_signature: <file>:<n>: error: could not find variable ``golden_val'' in ``test_filter'' <file>:<n>: error: unable to bind wire/reg/memory `golden_val' in `test_filter' <file>:<n>: warning: a for statement must use the index (p) in the condition expression to be synthesized in an always_ff process. <n> error(s) during elaboration
raw_error_example:
output/test_filter.sv:148: error: Could not find variable ``golden_val'' in ``test_filter''
output/test_filter.sv:149: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `golden_val' in `test_filter'
output/fir_filter.sv:131: warning: A for statement must use the index (p) in the condition expression to be synthesized in an always_ff process.
2 error(s) during elaboration.
root_cause: Testbench used an undeclared wire/reg `golden_val` that was not declared in the module.
fix_rule: Declare any signal used in the testbench before referencing it; add the declaration `reg signed [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] golden_val;` along with other local reg/integer declarations.
